items.desc: Mélyalapozás Ceresit átlátszó alapozó CT 17 átlátszó, 10 l:CERESIT CT 17 Transparent is a deep penetrating primer for the treatment of absorbent substrates. It strengthens the surface, reduces water absorption and impro…
items.raw_desc: Mélyalapozás Ceresit átlátszó alapozó CT 17 átlátszó, 10 l:CERESIT CT 17 Transparent is a deep penetrating primer for the treatment of absorbent substrates. It strengthens the surface, reduces water absorption and improves the adhesion of subsequent layers such as adhesives, paints, sealants or floor trowels. It is used indoors and outdoors before bonding ceramic tiles, levelling floors, painting or bonding insulation boards. The transparent, solvent-free formulation is vapour permeable,  and leaves no colouring - the substrate is clear after drying. Exercising with the hoop will help to slim the abdomen and waist and also reduce the tissues of the thighs and buttocks. The structure is composed of 12 parts and one part with magnets, at least 9 parts are needed to close the hoop. The individual parts conceal a rail into which an anchor fitted with 4 ball bearing castors is inserted before closing. A weight weighing 380 g is then attached to the anchor using a length-adjustable string. The string can be adjusted to a length of 15-30 cm, the longer it is, the heavier the weight will be due to centrifugal force. items.raw_desc: Szervízkészlet Sixtol Sada pro podtlakové/vakuové testování brzdových systémů Mechanic Brake Tester 22:The MECHANIC BRAKE TESTER 22 SIXTOL 22-piece service set for vacuum/pressure testing of brake systems is an important tool for the diagnosis and maintenance of brake systems in various types of vehicles. This kit allows you to perform vacuum/vacuum tests to detect potential brake system problems such as cracked hoses, leaks, or brake booster failures. The kit includes a metal pump with pressure gauge, two long elastic hoses, three short elastic hoses, two reservoirs for operating fluids, two caps and a set of clamps and connectors. This kit is used to test the pressure and vacuum of the vacuum solenoid valve, MAP sensors, fuel tank and brake bleeding systems. The tools are stored in a plastic case for easy storage and transport.
